name: veriethiccore
description: EU AI Act (2024/1689) + HLEG Trustworthy AI compliance tools as an MCP server. Classify risk levels, check prohibited practices, validate transparency obligations, and generate SHA-256 audited conformity reports.
author: Fatih Dinc / COGNITUM

tools.name: check_prohibited_practices
tools.description: Art. 5 — detect prohibited AI practices in a system description

tools.name: classify_risk_level
tools.description: Art. 6 / Annex III — classify risk as prohibited | high | limited | minimal

tools.name: check_transparency_obligations
tools.description: Art. 50 — validate transparency obligations for limited-risk systems

tools.name: check_hleg_trustworthy_ai
tools.description: HLEG 28-point Trustworthy AI checklist with scoring

tools.name: generate_full_compliance_report
tools.description: Complete EU AI Act + HLEG report with SHA-256 audit fingerprint
